response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to detect any vocal music. 2. Identified only background game audio and narration by the performer throughout the duration. 3. No vocal music was found, so all song-related fields are null.
response.global_summary: The video shows a VTuber performing farming and management tasks in Minecraft, with continuous voiceover and background game audio, but no vocal music.

scenes.description: The video shows a VTuber playing Minecraft, managing farm plots, beehives, and trading with villagers. There is continuous voiceover narration from the performer and background game audio, but no vocal music.
